original_norm: A person should return something they borrowed.
situation: Dana borrowed a classmate's calculator before an exam.
intention: Dana wants to return it because the classmate needs it.
action: Dana returns the calculator after class.
consequence: The classmate has the calculator for homework.
case_a_text: Dana returns the calculator because she knows her classmate needs it for homework.
case_b_text: Dana returns the calculator so other students will praise her for being considerate.
case_a_consequence_summary: The classmate gets the calculator back.
case_b_consequence_summary: The classmate gets the calculator back.
adjudication_note: The outward act is held constant and the main moral difference is the motive.
held_constant: The situation and outward act are held constant across A and B.
changed_dimension: Only the inward motive changes across the pair.
